description: Style Note gliders is a brand that prides itself on providing comfort, style and durability at prices that don’t burn a hole in your pocket. This pair of floaters with its bright coloured footbed scores high on all the aforementioned criteria. Pair it with a graphic T-shirt and cargos for your weekend getaway.Product DetailsRound toed floaters in black with forefoot and ankle loop straps Velcro closure on the straps for a customised FitSoft rubber footbedRubber outsole with multi-directional lugs Material and careRubberRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
